Related Entities

  • hospital ST MARY-CORWIN HOSPITAL 3-star overall rating
  • hospital PARKVIEW MEDICAL CENTER, INC 2-star overall rating
  • hospital COLORADO MENTAL HEALTH HOSPITAL IN PUEBLO
  • snf ROCK CANYON RESPIRATORY AND REHABILITATION CENTER 1-star, 151 beds
  • snf PAVILION AT VILLA PUEBLO, THE 3-star, 90 beds
  • snf Pueblo Heights Nursing and Rehabilitation 4-star, 120 beds
  • snf LAKESHORE POST ACUTE AND REHABILITATION CENTER 3-star, 106 beds
  • snf University Park Care Center 4-star, 180 beds
  • snf ATLAS POST ACUTE 4-star, 146 beds
  • snf LIFE CARE CENTER OF PUEBLO 4-star, 187 beds

Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-13. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026) CDC SDOH Measures for County (2017-2021)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
